seo.title: Engineering Blog | Embedded, AUTOSAR, IoT & Product Development
seo.description: Insights on embedded C/C++, AUTOSAR integration, IoT protocols (LoRaWAN/SIGFOX), and building reliable backends with React/Node.js. Updates on engineering culture and ISO 26262 practice.
seo.keywords: engineering blog, AUTOSAR, embedded C, IoT, LoRaWAN, SIGFOX, React, Node.js, ISO 26262
